examples: Acetylcholine is also the principal neurotransmitter in all autonomic ganglia.
In general, action potentials that reach the synaptic knobs cause a neurotransmitter to be released into the synaptic cleft.
Other antidepressants work on the neurotransmitter dopamine.
The other, Belviq, works on brain receptors for serotonin, a neurotransmitter than triggers feelings of satisfaction.
Another approach to cognitive enhancement, says Dr Robbins, is through a neurotransmitter called acetylcholine.
